title: evolvulus chamaepitys var. desertorum
intro: Evolvulus chamaepitys var. desertorum, also known as Desert Blue Daze, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae and is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent, which helps to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and minor burns. The health benefits of Desert Blue Daze include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb for treating various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Evolvulus chamaepitys var. desertorum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
